T0101.title: Manual Poverty-Lead Harvesting
T0101.definition: The practice by underground criminal groups of manually harvesting personal information belonging to recipients of poverty alleviation programs at scale through social media and other channels.

references.title: [Underground Data Insights] 2024 Data Breach Risk Landscape Report
